name: Chocolate-Raspberry Truffle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Semisweet chocolate squares (8 oz, cut into 1/2-inch cubes)
Cream cheese (8 oz, cut into 1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine wafer crumbs, melted butter, and sugar. Press mixture into the bottom and 1 1/2 inches up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Process chocolate cubes until finely ground in a food processor.
4. Add hot coffee through the feed tube while processing.
5. Continue processing until the chocolate is melted and smooth.
6. Add cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, eggs, whipping cream, vanilla extract, and raspberry liqueur. Process until mixture is smooth.
7. Pour filling into prepared crust.
8. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes (center will still be soft).
9. Let cheesecake cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
10. Cover and chill at least 8 hours in the refrigerator.
11. Carefully remove sides of pan.
12. Place each serving on a pool of raspberry sauce.
13. Garnish if desired.
Yield: 10 to 12 servings
